entity.name: xAI
entity.description: Elon Musk's frontier lab, operator of Grok and the Memphis "Colossus" cluster. Politically distinctive: aligned with MAGA tech-skeptic and accelerationist factions, vocal critic of OpenAI governance, and a focal point for content-moderation and election-integrity disputes via X integration.

activity.title: xAI joins SpaceX
activity.raw_text: February 02, 2026 · SpaceX announced today that it has acquired xAI. Read the full update here.

activity.title: Grok Imagine API
activity.raw_text: We're excited to unveil the Grok Imagine API, a unified bundle of powerful APIs designed for end-to-end creative workflows. Grok Imagine is our most powerful video-audio generative model yet. Bring an image to life, start from a simple text prompt, or even refine a complex cinematic sequence. Grok Imagine has best-in-class instruction following capabilities. Restyle scenes, add/remove objects, and control motion.

_verify_phrases: unified bundle of powerful APIs designed for end-to-end creative workflows
